# Uganda Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Uganda's administrative hierarchy:
> 4 regions, 135 districts, 203 countys, 1,520 sub-countys.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 4
- Total districts: 135
- Total countys: 203
- Total sub-countys: 1,520
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All countys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-county.json)
- [All sub-countys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-subcounty.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Central](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/central-ug1/) — 26 districts, 47 countys, 268 sub-countys
- [Eastern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/eastern-ug2/) — 37 districts, 54 countys, 454 sub-countys
- [Northern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/northern-ug3/) — 37 districts, 48 countys, 339 sub-countys
- [Western](https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/western-ug4/) — 35 districts, 54 countys, 459 sub-countys

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Central](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/central-ug1.txt)
- [Eastern](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/eastern-ug2.txt)
- [Northern](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/northern-ug3.txt)
- [Western](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/western-ug4.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (district), 3 (county), 4 (sub-county)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Uganda Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/uganda-administrative-divisions

- [ListBase](https://www.listbase.org) — Structured reference data for every country
- [open-admin-data](https://github.com/open-admin-data) — Open admin data for ASEAN
- [thailand-administrative-divisions](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions)
